overview.description: The iShares 3-7 Year Treasury Bond ETF (IEI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury (3-7 Y) index. The fund tracks a market weighted index of debt issued by the U.S. Treasury IEI was launched on Jan 5, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
